_publications._publicationTitle: Human cutaneous neurofibroma matrisome revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing.

_contextSnippet: This protocol was applied to fresh human cNFs at the globular stage and yielded a total of 17,132 transcriptomes (cells) across 3 samples.
details: Successfully generated 17,132 transcriptomes (cells) across 3 cutaneous neurofibroma samples for single-cell RNA sequencing
